title: Software Update - Headset and all other components are up to date - UI
scenario: Software Update tab in Device Settings correctly displays up-to-date status for all components (headset, charge stand, or charge case) with device image, name, and firmware version
steps: Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Tap on the Software Update tab
Observe the list of components displayed
expected: The Software Update tab displays each component with its device image, name, an "up to date" message, and the current firmware version. For single headsets, one entry is shown. For headsets with a charge stand, two entries (headset + stand) are shown. For earbuds with a charge case, two entries (earbuds + case) are shown.
